underlying_goal: Implement organisation/user filters on Avo conversations page (Linear ticket) and extend verify-ui skill to support staging deployments with auth handling
friction_detail: Initial joins(:organisation) was inefficient and caught in review; staging auth session cookies were invalidated across Cloud Run instances and --headed flag didn't work as expected.
brief_summary: User implemented Avo conversation filters and designed/built staging verify-ui support; both were delivered with minor friction around query optimization and staging auth.
